title: dryopteris perakensis
intro: Dryopteris perakensis, also known as the Perak shield fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. It is traditionally used in Malaysian and Southeast Asian folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris perakensis include treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
